birthdayRewards.title: Birthday Club
birthdayRewards.subtitle: Automatic customer treats
birthdayRewards.description: Customers will receive a message with this reward on their special day.
birthdayRewards.enableMessage: Enable Birthday Club to automate your rewards
birthdayRewards.actionRequiredDescription: Please select a coupon batch to reward your customers on their birthday.
birthdayRewards.updateSuccessDescription: Your birthday automation settings have been saved.
birthdayRewards.saveFailedDescription: Could not update birthday settings. Please try again.

inactiveRecall.title: Win-Back Club
inactiveRecall.subtitle: Reactivate sleeping customers
inactiveRecall.description: Customers who haven't visited in a while will get this treat.
inactiveRecall.enableMessage: Enable Win-Back Club to reactivate lapsed customers
inactiveRecall.actionRequiredDescription: Please select an incentive coupon to win back inactive customers.
inactiveRecall.updateSuccessDescription: Your win-back automation settings have been saved.
inactiveRecall.saveFailedDescription: Could not update recall settings. Please try again.

paidAds.adPreviewDescription: Full size preview of the promotional ad
paidAds.videoTooLarge: Video file is too large. Max size is 50MB.
paidAds.videoSelected: Video selected. Click 'Upload & Save' to finish.
paidAds.imageSelected: Image selected. Click Upload & Save to apply changes.

platformSettings.title: Social Connect
platformSettings.subtitle: Review channels
